title: Babergh: Solar PV servicing, repairs and maintenance contract (joint with Mid Suffolk)
description: Babergh District Council and Mid Suffolk District Council published a competitive tender and subsequent award notice for a contract covering servicing, repairs and maintenance of solar photovoltaic (PV) installations across their estates, supporting ongoing operation and resilience of local renewable generation assets.
statusRationale: A tender notice and a subsequent award notice have been published, indicating the solar PV servicing and maintenance contract is in delivery.
locationDescription: Representative central point for Babergh District, Suffolk (covering council estate solar PV installations across Babergh; joint contract with Mid Suffolk).
locationSource: Project description and Find a Tender / Contracts Finder notices indicating scope across Babergh District Council (and Mid Suffolk) estates; no single named facility provided.

evidence.source: Find a Tender (Babergh District Council / Mid Suffolk District Council)
evidence.summary: Contract notice seeking bids for a joint contract to service, repair and maintain solar PV installations for Babergh District Council and Mid Suffolk District Council.

evidence.title: Solar PV Servicing, Repairs and Maintenance Contract for Babergh District Council and Mid Suffolk District Council (award notice)

evidence.summary: Award notice confirming contract award for solar PV servicing, repairs and maintenance for Babergh District Council and Mid Suffolk District Council.
